study.description: This study will extract data from Advocate Health Midwest Electronic Health Records with the purpose of contributing data to the INCLUDE DCC database. The goal of the study is to enable researchers to better study the root causes of co-occurring conditions experienced by people with Down syndrome with more clinical data added to what already exists.

study.description: This study will extract data from Advocate Health Midwest Electronic Health Records with the purpose of contributing data to the INCLUDE DCC database. The goal of the study is to enable researchers to better study the root causes of co-occurring conditions experienced by people with Down syndrome with more clinical data added to what already exists.
search_text: This study will extract data from Advocate Health Midwest Electronic Health Records with the purpose of contributing data to the INCLUDE DCC database. The goal of the study is to enable researchers to better study the root causes of co-occurring conditions experienced by people with Down syndrome with more clinical data added to what already exists.
